name: yamtam-engine
tagline: Personal agent operating system — safety hooks, memory, agents for Claude Code
highlights: 24 safety hooks — blocks rm -rf, force push, prod deploys, unscoped DB ops
87 agents across root and domain subfolders (quality, security, infra, data-ai, orchestration, forge)
152 slash commands (security-audit, performance-audit, write-tests, ultra-think, tdd-cycle, smart-fix, handoff-verify, commit-push-pr)
64 skills (gitnexus x7, agenthub, write-a-skill, pulse, research, team-orchestrator, strategic-compact, security-compliance, and more)
L1 Atomic Memory — persistent facts with confidence levels and tag search
L2 Session Memory — provisional session-scoped facts, gitignored
123 checks: 47 hook + 12 audit-chain + 58 skill trigger + 6 command smoke — all pass before each release
Truth Gate (L3) — warns on claim verbs without evidence
